title: Yean Vilundhai lyrics Pattaya Kelappanum Pandiya Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Swetha Mohan, Abhay Jodhpurkar
Music: Aruldev
Movie:Pattaya Kelappanum Pandiya

[
Yean Vilundhai, en vzhigalil
nee niraindhaai, en manadhinil
kaattril parakkum siragaai
naan medhuvaai karaigiren.

Vandha neram andhi neram
nenjin oram yedho aache.
Konja neram andha neram
kannil eeram kaaindhe poche.

Imaigal moodaamale,
idhayam thaangaamale, haiyoo
vizhiyinil thindraai ennai.
] (2)

En vaanil ennakena oru megam.
thaagam theerndhe pogum.
Vaasal thaandi thendralum
thazhuvi thazhuvi thalai kodhumey.

MInnal theendi jeevanum
thalumbi thalumbi karai modhumey.
oru nooru jenmam vendum unnaruge,
vizhiyinil thindraai ennai.

Enakkulle oru saaral
veesum, unnaal, thaaney
Un swaasam kayill alliye
parugi parugi uyir vazhgiren.

Pudhu nesam nenjil yendhiye
urugi urugi naan pogiren
Oru kodi aayul vendum un nizhalil,
vizhiyinil thindraai ennai.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yean Vilundhai'?

The song conveys feelings of love and longing, expressing deep emotions associated with romance.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Pattaya Kelappanum Pandiya, the song captures a romantic moment between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Abhay Jodhpurkar and Shweta Mohan.

Who composed the music for 'Yean Vilundhai'?

The music for this song was composed by Aruldev.

When was 'Yean Vilundhai' released?

The song was released on February 11, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yean Vilundhai, the romantic essence of love is beautifully captured through the heartfelt lyrics and melodious voices of Abhay Jodhpurkar and Shweta Mohan. The song plays a pivotal role in Pattaya Kelappanum Pandiya, enhancing the emotional connection between the characters. It evokes feelings of joy and nostalgia, making it perfect for romantic occasions. The soothing melody and expressive singing create a memorable listening experience that resonates with anyone in love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yean Vilundhai from Pattaya Kelappanum Pandiya is a captivating romantic duet that beautifully showcases the enchanting voices of Abhay Jodhpurkar and Shweta Mohan. With Aruldev's melodious composition, this song evokes a sense of love and longing that resonates deeply. Perfect for celebrating special moments, it’s a must-listen for all Tamil music lovers!
stanzaMeanings: Why did you fall, you have settled in my eyes, like a butterfly flying in my heart, I am holding onto you tightly.
When the time came, it was a dark moment, something happened near my heart. For a while, that moment has flowed in my eyes.
Without closing the doors, the heart cannot bear it, oh, you have entered my eyes.
In my sky, there is a cloud for me. The thirst will be quenched. The breeze passing through the doorway will embrace and bless me.
Like lightning, life will dive and dive, it needs a hundred lifetimes for you, you have entered my eyes.
Inside me, a breeze blows because of you, only your breath is there, I am living on, flying and flying.
A new affection melts in my heart, I am going away. I need a thousand years in your shadow, you have entered my eyes.
